sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105056" key="tri/mnws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-μνως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ω</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μνᾶ</etym>) <sense id="n105056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a three-mina piece,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
